data.title: Snowflake's CEO says software giants risk becoming a 'dumb data pipe' to AI models
data.description: "The big model makers want to create a world in which all of the data for all of the enterprises is easily available to them," Sridhar Ramaswamy said.
data.content:

data.title: Gold's rally isn't a sign of a commodity supercycle, Goldman Sachs says
data.description: Rising prices spur more supply in metals like copper, unlike gold's constrained output, limiting the odds of a lasting commodities supercycle.
data.content:
Gold's powerful rally isn't a sign that a broader commodity boom is taking hold, Goldman Sachs says.

data.title: Rampant AI demand for memory is fueling a growing chip crisis
data.description: The cost of one type of DRAM soared 75% from December to January, accelerating price hikes throughout the holiday quarter.
data.content: A growing procession of tech industry leaders including Elon Musk and Tim Cook are warning about a global crisis in the making: A shortage of memory chips is beginning to hammer profits, derail corpo… [+10846 chars]
